text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru now faces the Kinko Sho,
where Silence Suzuka will be competing as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Puffed up with pride, Matikanefukukitaru
declares how much she's changed compared to
last year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is concerned by her strange
mannerisms and how she seems to believe that
her luck is infallible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a strange glint in her eye, she heads to the
track.
